_comment: usage.example.json — synthetic placeholder for the gitignored config/usage.db SQLite database. Schema is auto-created by lib/usage.js on first run. Logs per-event usage for billing/analytics.

statements: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS usage_events (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, workspace_id TEXT DEFAULT 'default', user_id TEXT DEFAULT 'anonymous', event_type TEXT NOT NULL, resource_id TEXT, metadata TEXT, timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
